seoTitle: Campania vs Campbell Town — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Campania and Campbell Town. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Campania vs Campbell Town: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Campania and Campbell Town.
heading: Campania vs Campbell Town — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Campania, Tasmania and Campbell Town, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Campbell Town has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Campania (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Campania or Campbell Town safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Campania has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Campbell Town scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Campania scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Campbell Town scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Campania or Campbell Town?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Campbell Town has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
